meta_title: For Founders: passive income to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Passive Income to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop searching for project ideas. Learn how to build passive income SaaS products using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert-level founder's checklist.
content.answer_block: The 'no project ideas' paralysis stems from over-analyzing instead of shipping. To generate passive income, pivot from building 'products' to solving 'micro-pain points' in high-volume niches. Use Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative deployment. Focus on high-intent search queries to identify profitable, automated solutions that scale without manual intervention.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You have the technical stack, the compute, and the hunger, yet you remain trapped in the cycle of endless ideation, waiting for a 'unicorn' concept that never arrives. The market doesn't pay for genius; it pays for relief. Your inability to find a project is simply a failure to identify a burning, repeatable problem that someone is already paying to solve.

Passive income isn't magic; it is the byproduct of a well-engineered system that operates while you sleep. By leveraging modern AI agents like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can collapse the development lifecycle from months to days. It is time to stop thinking like a hobbyist and start operating like a system architect. Let’s build your first recurring revenue stream.

steps.title: Niche Validation via Search Intent
steps.description: Identify high-volume, low-competition keywords using SEO tools to find where users are struggling. Focus on 'how-to' queries that imply a workflow bottleneck.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following list of high-intent search queries and identify 3 micro-SaaS opportunities that can be solved with a single-purpose AI tool. Focus on high-margin B2B sectors.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Research potential SaaS niches based on high-intent search volume for automated workflow tools.'

steps.title: Rapid MVP Scaffolding
steps.description: Generate the foundational architecture of your application. Avoid boilerplate hell by using intelligent scaffolding to set up your database and API endpoints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, scalable Next.js and Supabase boilerplate for a subscription-based micro-SaaS. Include authentication, Stripe integration, and a responsive dashboard layout.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize project structure with Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe checkout flow.'

steps.title: Core Logic Automation
steps.description: Implement the AI logic that provides the actual value. This is the engine of your passive income machine.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer that interacts with the OpenAI API to process user inputs based on the identified niche. Ensure error handling and cost management are built-in.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the core AI processing service and integrate it with the API route handlers.'

steps.title: Frictionless Monetization
steps.description: Integrate payment gateways to ensure you capture value. Passive income requires a 'set-and-forget' billing cycle.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the Stripe webhook handler to manage successful payments, trial periods, and subscription cancellations for the SaaS application.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Configure Stripe webhooks and secure user subscription status in the database.'

steps.title: Automated Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Push to production with a CI/CD workflow that allows for instant updates and minimal downtime.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow file that automates testing and deployment to Vercel upon every push to the main branch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Configure CI/CD pipeline for automated deployments to Vercel.'

pro_tips: Always build for a 'job to be done' rather than a feature set; users pay for outcomes, not software.
Use 'feature flagging' to test new revenue models on a subset of users before global rollout.
Keep your database schema lean; bloated data models are the primary cause of slow iteration cycles.
Prioritize email capture over social media vanity metrics; your mailing list is your most reliable asset for passive growth.
Implement automated error tracking early; if you don't know it's broken, you aren't making money.
content.next_steps: After completing your MVP, focus exclusively on SEO-driven content marketing to funnel traffic to your landing page. Analyze user behavior for 30 days, then optimize your conversion funnel.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the roadmap to build, deploy, and monetize. The only variable remaining is your execution. Stop waiting for the perfect idea and start building the perfect system. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
